economic_notes: First Nation operates Business Enterprises and Economic Development segments. Subsidiaries include Petrokas Ltd., Kasabonika Community Development Corporation, Wechimachida Construction Services (GP) Corporation, and Wechimachida Construction Limited Partnership. GBEs include Kasabonika SGR GP Inc. and Kasabonika SGR Limited Partnership. Portfolio investments include Landmark Inn Limited Partnership and Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership among others.
notes: Audit is qualified because the financial statements do not present a comparison with originally planned budget amounts, which is a departure from Canadian public sector accounting standards. The First Nation was not in compliance with loan covenants requiring timely submission of audited financial statements as at March 31, 2022. Capital lease obligations of $115,460 exist in addition to long-term debt. Annual debt service reflects only long-term debt repayments; capital lease repayments were $109,350 additional. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($41,628,319) + Government of Ontario ($3,095,799) + CMHC ($469,822) + Sioux Lookout First Nations Health Authority ($196,793) = $45,390,733. Prior year includes non-recurring ISC prior year reimbursement of $1,868,875 and loss on investment in government business partnership of $922,942.
